title: Dictyopteris gymnocarpa
taxonomy: Dictyopteris gymnocarpa is classified within the family Dictyotaceae. This family belongs to the order Dictyotales. The class of Dictyopteris gymnocarpa is Phaeophyceae, which is a group of brown algae. The phylum to which it belongs is Ochrophyta, and the kingdom is Chromista. It is a type of marine brown alga, commonly found in tropical and subtropical waters.
uses: Dictyopteris gymnocarpa has been utilized in traditional medicine for its potential benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
